post.summary: Exchange long-lived Slack token for rotating tokens
post.description:
One-time exchange of a long-lived `xoxb-` bot token for rotating tokens via Slack's `tooling.tokens.rotate` API.

**Required environment variables:**

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `SLACK_CLIENT_ID` | Slack app client ID |
| `SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET` | Slack app client secret |
| `SLACK_ACCESS_TOKEN` | Existing long-lived `xoxb-` token |

After a successful exchange, the new rotating access token, refresh token, and expiry are persisted to `.slack_tokens.json` and updated in the process environment.

400.description: Missing required env vars or exchange failed.
